root_text.sn22.98:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn22.98:1.3: “atthi nu kho, bhante, kiñci rūpaṁ, yaṁ rūpaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati?
root_text.sn22.98:1.4: Atthi nu kho, bhante, kāci vedanā …pe…
root_text.sn22.98:1.7: kiñci viññāṇaṁ, yaṁ viññāṇaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassatī”ti?
root_text.sn22.98:1.8: “Natthi kho, bhikkhu, kiñci rūpaṁ yaṁ rūpaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassati.
root_text.sn22.98:1.12: kiñci viññāṇaṁ, yaṁ viññāṇaṁ niccaṁ dhuvaṁ sassataṁ avipariṇāmadhammaṁ sassatisamaṁ tatheva ṭhassatī”ti.

translation_text.sn22.98:1.2: Seated to one side, that mendicant said to the Buddha:
translation_text.sn22.98:1.3: “Sir, is there any form at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever?
translation_text.sn22.98:1.7: consciousness at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever?”
translation_text.sn22.98:1.8: “Mendicant, there is no form at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever.
translation_text.sn22.98:1.12: consciousness at all that’s permanent, everlasting, eternal, imperishable, and will last forever and ever.”
